title: scrophularia incisa var. pinnata
intro: Scrophularia incisa var. pinnata, also known as Japanese figwort, is a variety of the Scrophularia genus that is native to Japan and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Japanese figwort include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. Japanese figwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
